name: Athena RPC: network status (getNetworkMetered, getNetworks)
description: Add two openpilot athenad RPC methods: getNetworkMetered (returns bool - is the current connection metered?) and getNetworks (returns a list of available networks with SSID, signal strength, etc.). Reference: openpilot/system/athena/athenad.py lines 549-560 (../../openpilot/system/athena/athenad.py). These complement the existing CallGetNetworkType so the UI can render a complete network panel.
acceptance_criteria: internal/ws/methods.go gains CallGetNetworkMetered(caller, client) (bool, error) following the CallGetNetworkType pattern
internal/ws/methods.go gains CallGetNetworks(caller, client) ([]map[string]interface{}, error) -- list of network dicts
RegisterDefaultHandlers installs device-side stub handlers for both methods returning plausible values (metered=false, networks=[])
internal/ws/methods_test.go covers both Call* functions including success and RPC-error paths
go vet ./... and go build ./... pass cleanly
